reviews.review_text: Great game, tons of content - I would prefer instead of separate game modes they actually focus on extending main game - there is still tons of stuff to do but extending main game should be priority. There is no other game like that, its not pay to win - you can enjoy without paying and some DLCs are indeed overpriced but after discount they can be at good enough. Totally recommended!

Good game, great visual and audio design, but the constant power creep and premium price tag on some of the better parts is definitely a turnoff for people that want to play for free. The devs are active but maybe a bit lazy and maybe should listen to the players a bit more. 

Until something better comes around, this game will be hanging on by a thread.
